name: Apricot-Walnut Strudel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix flour and salt.
3. Cut in softened butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Beat egg and sugar into the crumb mixture; add milk and vanilla extract, stirring until combined.
5. Stir in chopped walnuts and dried apricots.
6. Roll out dough on a floured surface to about 1/8 inch thickness.
7. Spread filling evenly over the dough, leaving a border around the edges.
8. Fold the sides over the filling, then roll up tightly from the long side.
9. Place strudel seam-side down on parchment paper-lined baking sheet.
10. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Let cool completely before serving.
